name: BFS/DFS Applications — Islands, Clone Graph, Walls and Gates

metadata.career_relevance: Core BFS/DFS Applications — Islands, Clone Graph, Walls and Gates patterns.

hook.what_you_will_build: BFS/DFS Applications — Islands, Clone Graph, Walls and Gates

key_takeaways: BFS = FIFO — level by level — shortest path in unweighted graph
DFS = LIFO/recursion — explore depth first — cycle detection, topo order
Clone Graph: DFS + HashMap for node mapping
Walls & Gates: multi-source BFS from all gates simultaneously
Cycle in directed: DFS with 3-state color (0=white, 1=gray, 2=black). Gray neighbor = cycle.
Bipartite: 2-color BFS; same color neighbor = not bipartite
